items.raw_desc: Fürdőjáték Lilliputiens Úszó fürdőcsónak - dzsungel, 3 db:A Lilliputiens három úszó kishajó játékot a gyermeked imádni fogja. items.raw_desc: Zenélő játék Baby Einstein Drum & Learn Dean, fejlesztő játék:Baby Einstein Drum & Learn Dean is an interactive and multisensory toy that teaches children colours, shapes and instruments in a fun way. Includes 2 game modes that develop musical perception and cognition. Composer mode plays layered instrument sounds and encourages a relationship with the music, while discovery mode teaches colours, shapes and tools in 4 languages (English, Spanish, French, German). When Dean's head is pressed, the nose lights up and the hands move up and down, making the toy develop fine motor skills and an understanding of cause and effect. Children will be captivated by the light-up buttons, phrases and classic melodies that stimulate sight, hearing and touch. Dean the dog has 2 wrinkled ears and 3 sensory ribbons for tactile exploration. The educational toy is suitable for children from 6 months and requires 3 AA batteries (included for demo only).
